sizing_rule.note: Ralph Vince optimal f sizing (0.25 example: bet $1 per $4 stake). Permits aggregated capital allocation >100% across negatively correlated systems, enabling position sizing on equity bases <$10,000. Geometric mean return 1.0607 for f=0.25 example.

source_rule_text: When trading multiple correlated systems with negative correlation, allocate capital such that the sum of percentage allocations can exceed 100%, allowing position sizing on smaller equity bases than would be optimal for single systems.
